title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PANDI CENTRAL SCHOOL SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANDI, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO MAMERTO C. BERNARDO MEMORIAL CENTRAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 655

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6663, June 22, 1988 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PANDI CENTRAL SCHOOL SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANDI, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO MAMERTO C. BERNARDO MEMORIAL CENTRAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and the House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Pandi Central School situated in the Municipality of Pandi, Province of Bulacan, hereby changed to Mamerto C. Bernardo Memorial Central School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representative was finally passed by the Senate and the House of Representatives on May 27, 1988 and April 28, 1988 respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Acting Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the

House of Representatives

Approved: June 22, 1988

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
